items.title: A Requiem for Communist Cuba’s Apologists
items.description: Conditions on the island are deteriorating rapidly.

items.title: Sorry, Bad Bunny — the USA Is Indeed ‘America’
items.description: Sad to say, he’s late to the game. Americans began calling themselves Americans in the 1700s.

items.title: The Coming Political-Process Armageddon
items.description: Democrats could find themselves briefly in power with their prospects slipping away. Beware what they may do.

items.title: China’s Monstrous Sentencing of Jimmy Lai
items.description: Foreign nations should think twice about flirting with Beijing as a reliable partner.

items.title: Why Canada Engaged China Ahead of the USMCA Review
items.description: The country’s trade deal with Beijing is risk-management under pressure, not a pivot away from the United States.
